note: Calculation order: (1) Simulate per-wave: hp = round((hp + 4) * num17), where num17 = baseRate * waveRangeScale * num12 + 1. (2) Multiply by enemyMultiplier for the enemy type. (3) Apply enemy_hp post-multiplier (BKDLELOLPOC): hp *= (1 - researchLevels*0.03) * (1 - techLevels*0.03) * (1 - runeLevels*0.03) * (1 - 0.05*wavePerkEffect*wavePerkLevels) * (0.9 if lbIconGems3 IAP owned). Tech base max=15, extended to 25 by Supreme Tech enemy_hp_max upgrade (same 3% rate).

enemyMultipliers.note: Applied to baseEnemyHp_big before BKDLELOLPOC() reduction. Source: Enemy.cs spawnEnemy(). runeBoss and techBoss use separate HP systems not based on baseEnemyHp_big. pvpBoss (Immortal Boss) uses int.MaxValue.
enemyMultipliers.runeBoss: separate — uses DataManager.runeBossHp_big (Shadow Ancient boss system)

enemy_hp.note: Each source is its own multiplicative factor. Tech base max = 15; Supreme Tech 'enemy_hp_max' upgrade extends it by up to 10 extra levels (same 3% rate). Combined tech cap = 25 levels.

wave_skip_chance.note: Chance (%) to skip the HP growth step entirely for a wave, keeping enemies at the previous wave's HP. Formula (from KGBOFBPEODO): chance = tournamentLevels * 0.5 + runeLevels * 0.1. Only triggers on new highest-wave exploration, not on replayed waves.
